title: Previous versions - SonarLint Documentation - Eclipse
content:
# Previous versions

## [Installing previous versions](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/previous-versions/#installing-previous-versions "Installing previous versions")

Installation of an earlier version is possible by downloading the appropriate asset from the [SonarQube for Eclipse repository](https://binaries.sonarsource.com/?prefix=SonarLint-for-Eclipse/releases/ "SonarQube for Eclipse repository") before following the [Offline installation](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/getting-started/offline-installation/ "Offline installation") instructions.

To run previous versions of SonarQube for Eclipse, you must also install the required version of Java. Please see the [Requirements](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/getting-started/requirements/ "Requirements") to check which version of JVM is right for you.

When [installing SonarQube for Eclipse](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/getting-started/installation/ "installing SonarQube for Eclipse") from the Eclipse Marketplace, the newest available version for your version of Eclipse will be presented. Check the SonarQube for Eclipse [Requirements](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/getting-started/requirements/ "Requirements") page for more details.
